CustomField.description: Automatically calculates how many weekdays an Opportunity has been open. Open Opportunities count from Created Date to today; closed Opportunities count from Created Date to Close Date.
CustomField.formula: IF( IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) <= DATEVALUE(CreatedDate), 0, 5 * FLOOR((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)) / 7) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 1 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 1) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 1) <= 6, 1, 0 ) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2) <= 6, 1, 0 ) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 3 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 3) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 3) <= 6, 1, 0 ) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 4 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 4) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 4) <= 6, 1, 0 ) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 5 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 5) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 5) <= 6, 1, 0 ) + IF( MOD((IF(IsClosed, CloseDate, TODAY()) - DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)), 7) >= 6 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 6) >= 2 && WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 6) <= 6, 1, 0 ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 開啟中商機會每日更新；已結案商機固定為建立日至結案日的工作天數（僅排除週六、週日）。
CustomField.label: 已開啟天數
